content: OE Wanda/OE Daff/High Invest Nautila + OE Inferno/E3 Horla/E3 Clem, can clear Arc 2 fully.
Downside is a Kath E3 with high invest, and solid supports can clear Arc 2(Higher invest Supports for Chapter 4)
I would trust Kaly thou, since I know they play Daff more than the people I asked…
Wanda Caecus is a standard dtide team. The other 2 float depending on the dtide.
My Daff is at E5, Horla E1, Clem E1.. should I invest ...

OE Daff is what most of the new units are based off of....Pollux adding 2 cards to hand, gMurphy adding 2 cards to hand. 

It was one of the strongest oe in the game and its being duplicated.
Answer is Yes, if you are trying to run Wanda to clear Arc 2. OE Daff and Nautila will help a bunch Arc 2 Chap 1 and 2. Wanda will be solid for Chapter 3 and 4(according to others info).
Its a large commitment to make Wanda work compared to another carry, but to each their own~

Get through easiest and fastest. 

Pollux / Clem / gMurphy / Castor

You will cruse through the game.

Why do you think that?

You have 4 of the best units in the game. Depending on the situation, play the best cards. Its not hard to choose....

Too many people get stuck on leap/quasar.

Who cares when every unit is stupid strong.

I mean...I guess I'm just not fond of 3 dps within the same team. Castor needs another DPS so it's fine, but GMurphy as well...uh...my thoughts are just that there would be more benefit with more weakness/vuln apply, while Pollux will do the dps job.
I guess so...

Clem debuff is a type of weakness vulnerable.

But again they can choose to do what they want.

I agree with you not the most synergistic team. But that was not the ask.

Play clem to heal.
Rotate between pollux and gMurphy as dps.
Use Castor to shield and apply weakness.

I'm not judging, saying just in case. I'm just questioning to understand stuff I might not be familiar with better. Pollux is E0, while I'm not sure about how strong he is at that point, GMurphy/Castor/Clem/Horla should work as well, right?

For Covenants:

Clem: Build - Life Drain, this is the farmable keyflare/embryo generation wheel opens after clears chapter 7

Liz: I would recommend replacing her tbh, but otherwise should be using Steppenwolf

GDoll: Re-Evolution from pear exchange shop or dream of medicine, dream is likely not unlocked yet

Pollux: April or Steppenwolf with an emphasis on Crit Rate / Crit dmg / and dmg amplification

Mmmk I think Flares has a pretty decent guide for covenants. 

In general though you will want to build a couple priority ones:

Life Drain , Steppenwolf, the death resist one from chapter 4? , April which is Hamlin chapter , and dream of medicine. There are a couple more that are best in slot but try to start with these
U can dissemble Dues Ex which I think are the green ones. Unused after beginning chapters
how do i know which stats i should pick on each piece, does it vary by character?
like I'll start with steppenwolf for Liz I suppose and dream of medicine for gdoll, since those are my mains

So for Poison you want a lot of dmg amp, dmg amp also is Team Wide, so it can be useful in even support units. 

Liz can crit with her ult so crit rate and dmg are also wanted. So aim for stats with those three. Main stats for the pieces have a pre-determined layout (You can’t have pure crit chance for example)  

Doll: aim for allimus, keyflare , and dmg amp

The keyflare wheel and death resist ones are pretty easy. As much keyflare or deathresist as possible the rest into dmg amp

Here is the doc for the layouts of the slices to help determine which main to aim for:

https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1-sVqcMK8TGINQCDB4eyye_GgOAHH371A2D_vnRHVvYc/htmlview#gid=0

embeds.title: Yet Another Morimens Guide: Covenant Stat Spreads

content: thank you so ridiculously much for walking me through this\
Aye aye, never be afraid to ask questions 🙂
Does Pollux need his wheel, or is he happy with something like Titan or Kath's wheel?

Pollux doesn’t really need his wheel.

Titan will work fine on him until you have something else or a different unit that can take advantage of it more (Kath).

Otherwise any crit rate crit dmg wheel will work fine on him. Most of his dmg ramp comes from his sin stacks.

That all said his wheel is best in slot if you have the pulls available

Thanks!
Just planning my pulls for the last week of reruns
Guys I'm a newbie, are these comps good? what changes can I make? what other comps can I try? I only have these and a bunch of standard characters

First Comp Lumaria squad

They actually come online for arc 2, which is after you clear chapters 1-9. Otherwise without the talent active Tulu and Goliath and kinda just stat sticks. Should still be ok but consider swapping them out if you have trouble.

Team 2: pretty decent for Corpo discard team. Caucus might be the odd one out, as he’s really only there for Vuln application. Probably needed until Corpo E3 at that point I would swap him for Cassiah who has a cheap discard to help cycle faster

just joined a day or two ago, this is who i currently have <:takenotes:1357186646294138890> 
what would be a good team to go for atm?
also really interested in pollux, doresain, pickman (if theyre any good) (hot=good surely) and i'm wondering what other units/comps those would need?

you pulled for aequor units so build an aequor team i guess. Gmurphy, caecus, corposant, celeste will carry you through the entire arc 1 storyline

your favorite units are all good, not top tier but very solid, worth pulling for if you like them

pollux is a high damage dps who inflicts bleed

doresain is a dps who excels at cleaning up mobs but can struggle on bosses

pickman is a good general support for caro teams

when building a team you usually pick a dps and then surround them with 3 supports that enable them. Pollux for example has no defensive skills or utility, so he likes teammates like his bro castor who gives shields, or horla who applies various team buffs and inflicts vuln/weakness
your team sounds good so its probably a skill issue

Blue rarity wheels like greed, gluttony, frenzy, emerge
Gluttony lets you go into the boss fight with 40% higher max hp

Gmurphy is probably the one doing the most direct damage on your team so you give her the best dps wheels you have
something like blade of the titan and then a keyflare wheel because she scales with keyflare
and then you can do something like give 1 R wheel and 1 personal buff wheel to each of the other awakeners
whoever is lowest level gets to become your wheel carrying servant
